zh.of, Woodsome, Yorkshire, England: 英國英格蘭越可爾武德頌 李斯
zh.Woodsome Lees, Yorkshire, England: 英國英格蘭越可爾武德頌 李斯
zh.lifeSummary: 當Sir John I Kaye於1311年出生在英國越可爾武德頌 李斯時，他的父親William Kaye27歲，母親Mrs William Kaye26歲。他於大約1335年與Margaret Fincheden在英國英格蘭越可爾結婚。他們至少是6個兒子的父母。他去世於1379年之後在英國英格蘭越可爾武德頌 李斯。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Sir John I Kaye于1311年出生在英国越可爾武德頌 李斯时，他的父亲William Kaye27岁，母亲Mrs William Kaye26岁。他于大约1335年与Margaret Fincheden在英国英格兰越可爾结婚。他们至少是6个儿子的父母。他去世于1379年之后在英国英格兰越可爾武德頌 李斯。

nameMeanings.name: Kaye
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (Yorkshire), Irish (Kerry), and North German: variant of   Kay  . Compare   Keye  .

variants.name: Kay
meanings: English: nickname from northern Middle English ka, kae, kay ‘jackdaw’, from Old Norse ká or Old English cā. See also Daw .
English: nickname from Middle English cai, kay, kei ‘left-handed, clumsy’.

English: occasionally perhaps an occupational name from Middle English kai(e), kei(e) ‘key’, applied to a maker of keys (compare Kear ), or alluding to the office of keeper or bearer of keys, but clear evidence for this is wanting.

variants.name: Keye
meanings: English (Cheshire and Lancashire), Irish (Kildare), and North German: variant of   Kaye  .

nameMeanings.name: John
meanings: Greek: the Lord gave graciously; whom Jehovah gave; whom Jehovah bestowed.

historicEvents.title: Famine Strikes Europe
historicEvents.description: A famine caused by cold winters and wet summers across Europe caused millions to die due to starvation. Desperation from hunger caused high levels of crime, stampedes in bread lines in London, infanticide, and even cannibalism throughout Europe.

historicEvents.title: First War of Scottish Independence
historicEvents.description: The First War of Scottish Independence began after England invaded Scotland in 1296. The Treaty of Edinburgh was signed in 1328 which declared peace between the two kingdoms and brought the war to an end.

historicEvents.title: The Hundred Years' War
historicEvents.description: The Hundred Years' War between France and England was largely due to the question of legitimate succession to the French crown.

en.lifeSummary: When Sir John I Kaye was born in 1311, in Woodsome Lees, Yorkshire, England, his father, William Kaye, was 27 and his mother, Mrs William Kaye, was 26. He married Margaret Fincheden about 1335, in Yorkshire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 6 sons. He died after 1379, in Woodsome Lees, Yorkshire, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Sir John I Kaye est né en 1311, à Woodsome Lees, Everwyck, Angleterre, son père, William Kaye, avait 27 ans et sa mère, Mrs William Kaye, avait 26 ans. Il a épousé Margaret Fincheden environ 1335, à Everwyck, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 6 fils. Il est décédé après 1379, à Woodsome Lees, Everwyck, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: Als Sir John I Kaye 1311 in Woodsome Lees, Yorkshire, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater William Kaye 27 und seine Mutter Mrs William Kaye 26. Er hat um 1335 in Yorkshire, England, United Kingdom Margaret Fincheden geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 6 Söhne. Er starb nach 1379 in Woodsome Lees, Yorkshire, England, United Kingdom.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Sir John I Kaye è nato il nel 1311 nel Woodsome Lees, Yorkshire, England, il suo padre, William Kaye, aveva 27 anni e il suo madre, Mrs William Kaye, aveva 26 anni. Lui sposato Margaret Fincheden circa 1335, nel Yorkshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 6 figli. Morì dopo il 1379, nel Woodsome Lees, Yorkshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito.

ja.lifeSummary: Sir John I Kayeが1311年にイギリスヨークシュアイアウッドソメ リーズで生まれた時，父William Kayeは27歳，母Mrs William Kayeは26歳であった。約1335年にイギリスイギリスヨークシュアイアでMargaret Finchedenと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも6人の息子の親であった。彼は1379年以後にイギリスイギリスヨークシュアイアウッドソメ リーズで死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Sir John I Kaye(이)가 1311년 영국 요르크실르 우드소 리스에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 William Kaye(은)는 27세였고, 그의 어머니 Mrs William Kaye(은)는 26세였다. 그는 대략 1335년 영국 잉글랜드 요르크실르에서 Margaret Fincheden(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 여섯 명의 아들을 두었다. 그는 1379년 이후 영국 잉글랜드 요르크실르 우드소 리스에서 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Sir John I Kaye nasceu em 1311, em Woodsome Lees, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, William Kaye, tinha 27 anos e sua mãe, Mrs William Kaye, tinha 26 anos. Ele casou-se com Margaret Fincheden aproximadamente 1335, em Yorkshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 6 filhos. Ele faleceu após 1379, em Woodsome Lees, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Sir John I Kaye родился в 1311 г. в местности вудсом лись, еркшир, Англия, его отцу по имени William Kaye было 27 лет, а матери, которую звали Mrs William Kaye, 26. Он женился на женщине по имени Margaret Fincheden около 1335 г. в местности еркшир, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 6 сыновей. Он умер после 1379 г. в местности вудсом лись, еркшир, Англия, Великобритания.

Se casó con Margaret Fincheden aproximadamente 1335, en Yorkshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 6 hijos. Murió después de 1379, en Woodsome Lees, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido.
